task_completion.description: Verify the screenshot saved at /sdcard/ppi_comparison_table.png shows the Liverpool Cancer iChart app.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file viewer or image viewer displaying the screenshot, which should contain the distinctive UI of the Liverpool Cancer iChart application.

task_completion.description: Verify the screenshot shows the interaction result table comparing Omeprazole against both Erlotinib and Osimertinib.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The interaction table in the screenshot must explicitly list 'Omeprazole' as the co-medication and both 'Erlotinib' and 'Osimertinib' as the cancer drugs.

task_completion.description: Verify the report at /sdcard/ppi_switch_recommendation.txt exists and follows the exact requested format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing the file contents with the exact labels: 'Interaction 1: Erlotinib + Omeprazole', 'Color:', 'Interaction 2: Osimertinib + Omeprazole', 'Color:', 'Safer Choice:', and 'Reason:'.

task_completion.description: Verify the report correctly identifies the interaction color for Erlotinib + Omeprazole.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under 'Interaction 1', the 'Color:' field should state 'Yellow' (or indicate a potential weak interaction).

task_completion.description: Verify the report correctly identifies the interaction color for Osimertinib + Omeprazole.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under 'Interaction 2', the 'Color:' field should state 'Green' (or indicate no interaction expected).

task_completion.description: Verify the report correctly identifies the safer choice and provides a valid reason.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Safer Choice:' field must state 'Osimertinib'. The 'Reason:' field must explain that Erlotinib absorption is pH-dependent (or reduced by PPIs), whereas Osimertinib has minimal/no interaction.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually used the Liverpool Cancer iChart app to get the results.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshot of the interaction table must show the native Android UI of the Liverpool Cancer iChart app, not a web browser search or a text document.

integrity.description: Verify the screenshot file is a genuine capture of the device screen.
integrity.visual_evidence: The image saved to /sdcard/ppi_comparison_table.png should look like a full or partial Android screen capture, not a downloaded stock image or a blank file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just guess the text file contents without opening the app.
integrity.visual_evidence: Trajectory screenshots should show the agent opening the iChart app, searching for the specific drugs, and viewing the results before writing the text file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: In the Liverpool Cancer iChart app, the interaction color for Erlotinib + Omeprazole is Yellow (Potential Weak Interaction), and for Osimertinib + Omeprazole is Green (No Interaction Expected). The safer choice is Osimertinib because Erlotinib absorption is highly pH-dependent and is significantly reduced when co-administered with a PPI like Omeprazole, whereas Osimertinib has negligible interaction.
